ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface protocol used by the signal */,
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal type */,
  "init_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initial status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the signal */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the signal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the signal was last updated */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the signal was deprecated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or owns the signal */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the signal belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the signal (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_init_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("init_status_id") REFERENCES init_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interface protocol */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interface was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interface was last updated */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interface was deprecated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or owns the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the signal type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the signal type was last updated */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the signal type was deprecated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or owns the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "init_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initial status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the initial status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initial status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the initial status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the initial status was last updated */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the initial status was deprecated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or owns the initial status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "dependent_signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent signal */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was last updated */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was deprecated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or owns the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_dependencies_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_dependencies_dependent_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_dependencies_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_compatibilities" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "compatible_signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compatible signal */,
  "compatibility_type" TEXT /* Type of compatibility (e.g., compatible, incompatible) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compatibility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compatibility was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compatibility was last updated */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compatibility was deprecated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or owns the compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_compatibilities_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_compatibilities_compatible_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("compatible_signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_compatibilities_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_file" TEXT /* File path to the documentation file */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the documentation file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the documentation was last updated */,
  "deprecated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the documentation was deprecated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or owns the documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the documentation file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_documentation_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_documentation_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
